compiled_state.title: Implement SC-4 + SC-2 early-exit guards in apply-attribution-trailers.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Add two early-exit paths to plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh BEFORE any trailer construction: (1) SC-4 guard: if attribution-contributors.jsonl is absent or empty (zero bytes), exit 0 without modifying commit-msg-file; (2) SC-2 guard: if read_config_value returns attribution.enabled != 'true', exit 0 even with populated JSONL. Guards use read_config_value to read from dso-config.conf (same interface as T1b's guard). AC: (1) absent JSONL -> exit 0, cp commit.txt + diff shows unchanged (SC-4); (2) empty JSONL -> same; (3) attribution.enabled=false via temp dso-config.conf + populated JSONL -> exit 0, file unchanged (SC-2); (4) all T5a-test tests pass; (5) validate.sh --ci passes. NOTE: This task depends on T4-impl (same file; both modify apply-attribution-trailers.sh; must be serialized).
